title: Compass Tweak│羅盤調整
description: Holding down the right mouse button while holding a compass will display the Position and Dimension it indicates; using the Recovery Compass will teleport the player to the location where they last died.│手持羅盤並按下滑鼠右鍵，即可顯示羅盤指向的位置和維度；使用回生羅盤會將玩家傳送到上次死亡的位置。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Function│功能
1. Recovery Compass can be used by long-pressing the right mouse button. When in use, it will display the coordinates and dimensions of the last death.│回生羅盤可以長按右鍵使用，使用時會顯示上一次死亡的座標與維度。
2. Compass can be used by long-pressing the right mouse button. When in use, it will display the coordinates and latitude of the world's spawn point.│羅盤可以長按右鍵使用，使用時會顯示世界出生點的座標與維度。
3. Lodestone Compass can be used by long-pressing the right mouse button. When in use, it will display the coordinates and dimensions of the bound Lodestone.│磁石羅盤可以長按右鍵使用，使用時會顯示綁定的磁石的座標與維度。
4. When Sneaking and using a Lodestone Compass, it can be converted into a regular compass.│潛行時使用磁石羅盤可將其變為普通羅盤
5. When Offhand is holding an Echo Shard, using the Recovery Compass will teleport the user to the location of their last death and consume one Echo Shard.│當副手持有回响碎片時使用回生羅盤，會傳送至上次死亡的位置。
6. Compasses, Lodestone compasses, and Recovery Compass cannot be stacked.│羅盤、磁石羅盤與回生羅盤不可堆疊。
# Usage example video│使用示例影片
